metadata.title: Water Quality Status of NWMP Stations - Korba, Chhattisgarh
metadata.notes: Coordinates are based on verified geographic locations of the monitoring stations in Korba district, Chhattisgarh. Some early records (2018-2019) have missing FC/TC values due to scan quality.
